cases.title: Transfer valid amount between two existing users
cases.summary: A transfer with valid sender, receiver, positive EUR amount returns HTTP 200.
cases.expectedOutcome: Transfer succeeds and response contains operationId, status SUCCESS, sender/receiver IDs, amount, and currency.

steps.summary: Fund the sender's wallet with sufficient balance.
Transfer a valid EUR amount from sender to receiver.

cases.title: Transfer amount with exactly two decimal places
cases.summary: An amount with precisely two decimal places satisfies the precision constraint and returns HTTP 200.
cases.expectedOutcome: Transfer succeeds with the exact two-decimal amount.

steps.summary: Transfer an amount with exactly two decimal places (e.g., 50.99).

cases.title: Transfer optional comment field
cases.summary: A transfer that includes the optional comment field is accepted and returns HTTP 200.
cases.expectedOutcome: Transfer succeeds; comment is accepted without error.

steps.summary: Transfer a valid amount with the comment field populated.

cases.title: Reject self-transfer (senderId equals receiverId)
cases.summary: A transfer where senderId and receiverId are identical returns HTTP 400.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating self-transfer is not allowed.

steps.summary: Create the user who will be both sender and receiver.
Attempt a transfer with the same userId for both senderId and receiverId.

cases.title: Reject transfer with amount of zero
cases.summary: An amount equal to zero violates the greater-than-zero constraint and returns HTTP 400.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating the amount must be greater than 0.

steps.summary: Attempt a transfer with amount set to 0.

cases.title: Reject transfer with negative amount
cases.summary: A negative transfer amount is invalid and returns HTTP 400.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating the amount must be greater than 0.

steps.summary: Attempt a transfer with a negative amount.

cases.title: Reject transfer with more than two decimal places
cases.summary: An amount with more than two decimal places violates the precision constraint and returns HTTP 400.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating invalid amount format.

steps.summary: Attempt a transfer with an amount that has three or more decimal places.

cases.title: Reject transfer with unsupported currency
cases.summary: A currency other than EUR is rejected and returns HTTP 400.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating only EUR is supported.

steps.summary: Attempt a transfer with a currency other than EUR (e.g., USD).

cases.title: Reject transfer when sender has insufficient funds
cases.summary: A transfer exceeding the sender's current balance returns HTTP 402.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating insufficient funds.

steps.summary: Deposit a small amount to the sender's wallet.
Attempt to transfer an amount exceeding the sender's balance.

cases.title: Reject transfer when sender has zero balance
cases.summary: A transfer from a sender with no funds at all returns HTTP 402.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating insufficient funds.

steps.summary: Create the sender user with no initial deposit.
Attempt to transfer any positive amount from the zero-balance sender.

cases.title: Reject transfer when sender exceeds daily count limit (6th transfer)
cases.summary: The 6th outgoing transfer in a calendar day from a single sender returns HTTP 403.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating the daily transfer count limit has been exceeded.

steps.summary: Fund the sender's wallet with enough balance for multiple transfers.
Execute transfer 1 of 5 (within daily count limit).
Execute transfer 2 of 5 (within daily count limit).
Execute transfer 3 of 5 (within daily count limit).
Execute transfer 4 of 5 (within daily count limit).
Execute transfer 5 of 5 (at daily count limit boundary).
Attempt the 6th transfer which exceeds the daily count limit.

cases.title: Allow exactly 5 transfers in a calendar day (boundary)
cases.summary: The 5th outgoing transfer in a calendar day from a single sender succeeds with HTTP 200.
cases.expectedOutcome: Transfer succeeds, confirming 5 is the inclusive maximum for the daily count limit.

steps.summary: Fund the sender's wallet with enough balance for five transfers.
Execute transfer 5 of 5 — this is the boundary case that must succeed.

cases.title: Reject transfer when sender exceeds daily amount limit
cases.summary: A transfer that would push the sender's total daily outgoing beyond 5,000 EUR returns HTTP 429.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating the daily amount limit has been exceeded.

steps.summary: Fund the sender's wallet with more than 5,000 EUR.
Transfer 5,000 EUR to reach the exact daily amount limit.
Attempt an additional transfer of any positive amount, which exceeds the daily limit.

cases.title: Allow transfer that brings daily total to exactly 5,000 EUR (boundary)
cases.summary: A transfer that brings the sender's total daily outgoing to exactly 5,000 EUR returns HTTP 200.
cases.expectedOutcome: Transfer succeeds, confirming 5,000 EUR is the inclusive daily amount ceiling.

steps.summary: Fund the sender's wallet with at least 5,000 EUR.
Transfer exactly 5,000 EUR — this boundary case must succeed.

cases.title: Reject transfer when sender does not exist
cases.summary: A transfer referencing a non-existent senderId returns HTTP 404.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating the sender was not found.

steps.summary: Attempt a transfer using a senderId that does not exist.

cases.title: Reject transfer when receiver does not exist
cases.summary: A transfer referencing a non-existent receiverId returns HTTP 404.
cases.expectedOutcome: Request is rejected with an error indicating the receiver was not found.

steps.summary: Attempt a transfer using a receiverId that does not exist.
